name: blintz-monorepo
description: Monorepo for Blintz — a Vue-free React port of Milkdown's Crepe editor.
comment: Force a single @types/react across the workspace so no package gets a nested older copy (a nested @types/react 18 vs the root 19 splits ReactNode and breaks JSX-component types — the bigint/Promise<ReactNode> error).
